description: A customer has a new shipping address and it needs to be updated in their account.

nodes.task_description: Find the customer's account in the CRM.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the correct customer account.

nodes.task_description: Add the new address to the customer's list of shipping locations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately enters the new address details.

nodes.task_description: Set the new address as the default shipping address for future orders.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the customer's preferences to use the new address by default.
